description_long: This is a classic round dining table set with four matching chairs, featuring a dark polished wooden tabletop and cream-colored wooden legs and chair frames. The table stands on a central pedestal base with four curved feet, providing stability and a traditional aesthetic. Each chair has a high, decorative backrest with an openwork design and a gently curved top rail, as well as turned front legs and plain back legs. The chair seats are upholstered in a light fabric, adding comfort and a subtle contrast to the wood. The overall design is elegant and timeless, suitable for both formal and casual settings. The set exudes a vintage charm, making it ideal for use in urban cafes, dining rooms, or stylish indoor communal spaces.
description: A round, dark-wood dining table with a central pedestal base, accompanied by four cream-colored, upholstered chairs with decorative backs. The set has a classic, elegant look with vintage detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the table with three chairs visible, highlighting the ornate chair backs and the central pedestal base.
description_view_1: Side view with all four chairs visible, emphasizing the symmetry and the turned front legs of the chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the nearest chair and the openwork design of the chair backs.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying the table's pedestal base and the arrangement of the chairs around the table.
attribute_number_of_legs: central pedestal with four curved feet
